hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os,subprocess;d=json.load(sys.stdin);p=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path','');ext=os.path.splitext(p)[1].lower();(bool(p) and ext in {'.js','.jsx','.ts','.tsx','.json','.css','.scss','.md','.mdx','.html','.yml','.yaml'}) and subprocess.run(['npx','prettier','--write','--log-level','warn',p])" 2>/dev/null || true
